name: New User Welcome Email
description: Send a personalized welcome email when a new user registers. Triggered by a webhook from your app and sends an HTML email with the user's name.
author: platform

config.description: Called by your app when a new user registers

config.subject: Welcome to the platform, {{nodes.node-1.data.name}}!
config.html:
Welcome, {{nodes.node-1.data.name}}!

We're thrilled to have you on board. Get started by exploring our features.

If you need any help, just reply to this email.
